meta.title: GCA Projects · Gardening & Design · Bergen op Zoom
meta.desc: Full garden builds in Bergen op Zoom and West-Brabant: terraces, pergolas, lawns, planting and fencing. Rated 4.7/5 on Werkspot.
hero.title: Built with precision. Softened with green.
hero.sub: Terraces, pergolas, lawns and planting. Full garden builds by a small crew from Bergen op Zoom that shows up, works hard and gets every tile level.
svc.title: What we build
svc.sub: Six trades, one crew, from the first shovel to the final brush.
svc.1.title: Terraces & paving
svc.1.body: Porcelain tile, clinker brick and natural stone, laid laser-level on a proper foundation, with drainage that takes Dutch rain seriously.
svc.2.title: Pergolas & verandas
svc.2.body: Douglas fir structures, cut and fitted on site: a frame for your terrace, a canopy over your head.
svc.3.title: Natural & artificial lawns
svc.3.body: Fresh sod or premium turf on a levelled base. Flat, green and ready for bare feet.
svc.4.title: Planting & raised beds
svc.4.body: Raised planters in brick and stacked stone, olive trees, grasses and borders that finish the picture.
svc.5.title: Fencing & privacy
svc.5.body: Timber and composite fences: straight, solid and built to hold their line in every season.
svc.6.title: Maintenance & pruning
svc.6.body: Hedges, shrubs and trees pruned or removed. The heavy, messy work, cleared away by evening.
proj.title: Recent transformations
proj.sub: Real gardens, photographed by us on real workdays: before, during and after.
proj.a.title: Evening terrace in anthracite
proj.a.body: A worn concrete patio became an anthracite porcelain terrace with a white slot drain, a timber pergola, a gravel planting island with a stone monolith, and lighting for long evenings.
proj.a.chips: Porcelain terrace · Drainage · Pergola · Planting · Lighting
proj.b.title: Two-tone patio under Douglas fir
proj.b.body: The weathered octagonal pavers went out and two shades of grey porcelain went in, under a new Douglas fir pergola, with cobble-edged beds and a re-paved side passage.
proj.b.chips: Porcelain patio · Douglas fir pergola · Drainage channel · Side passage
proj.c.title: A compact garden with an olive tree
proj.c.body: From demolition to done: rust-beige porcelain laid laser-level, raised beds in dark brick with bluestone caps, and an olive tree to crown it.
proj.c.chips: Porcelain terrace · Raised beds · Olive tree · Trellis
proj.d.title: A family garden built for playing
proj.d.body: A tired lawn became a family garden: a curved clinker path through three pergola portals, a play mound with a tunnel, fresh sod and new fencing.
proj.d.chips: Clinker path · Pergola portals · Sod lawn · Play mound · Fence
proj.e.title: An artificial lawn with zero mowing
proj.e.body: Old patchy grass stripped, the base levelled and premium turf brushed in. A clean green garden, finished in days.
proc.title: Four steps, no surprises
proc.1.title: Visit & plan
proc.1.body: We come by, measure, and listen to how you want to use the garden. You get a clear plan and a sharp quote, with no surprises later.
proc.2.title: Groundwork & drainage
proc.2.body: The part you never see decides how long a garden lasts: excavation, a stable sub-base, drainage sized for Dutch rain.
proc.3.title: Build & finish
proc.3.body: Tiles laid laser-level with levelling clips, timber cut on site, edges closed clean. Hard work, precise hands.
proc.4.title: Handover & aftercare
proc.4.body: We brush, wash and walk you through the result. If something isn't right, we come back.
rev.title: What clients say
rev.1.quote: “Hard-working, friendly guys. They respond quickly and they keep their appointments.”
rev.2.quote: “Fast replies, a sharp quote, and they delivered more than promised. They work hard, and precisely.”
rev.3.quote: “Paving, fencing and a roof, all done professionally. Definitely recommended!”
rev.4.quote: “Neat, hard-working people. We can recommend them.”
rev.4.name: Homeowner, Oosterhout
rev.note: Quotes translated from Dutch. The originals are on Werkspot.
about.title: A small crew that shows up
about.body1: GCA Projects is a registered Dutch gardening company from Bergen op Zoom, founded by craftsmen who do the work themselves, from the first shovel to the final brush. The people who quote your garden are the people who build it.
about.body2: We work across West-Brabant and Zeeland: Bergen op Zoom, Halsteren, Hoogerheide, Oosterhout and around. You can reach us in English, Dutch or Romanian.
contact.title: Let’s look at your garden
contact.sub: Call, app or write. Tell us what you have in mind, send a few photos of your garden, and we’ll take it from there.
contact.waPrefill: Hello GCA Projects! I'd like to talk about my garden.
form.name: Name
form.hint: Opens in your email app. Or skip the form and message us on WhatsApp.
